overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character traversing rain-soaked Gothic rooftops at night. The camera follows Batman as he moves along elevated structures overlooking the neon-lit streets of Gotham City below, with a stormy atmosphere and dramatic city lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered rooftop ledge overlooking street intersection

agents.ego_description: Batman walks steadily along the rain-slicked rooftop edge, overlooking the circular plaza and streets below

entered.detail: Large digital screen displaying a face, mounted on the building wall
Circular street intersection visible far below with moving vehicle lights
Glowing neon advertisements on distant buildings
Ornate Gothic architecture with pointed arches and detailed stonework
Safety railing along the edge of the rooftop

segments.scene_description: Batman moves along a sheltered rooftop ledge high above the city streets. A large illuminated billboard dominates the left side while the circular plaza below is visible in the distance. The wet concrete surface reflects the ambient city lights, and Gothic architectural details frame the right side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop corner with Gothic architectural archways

events.description: Batman turns left around the corner of the building structure
View transitions from street level to panoramic city skyline as the camera rounds the corner

agents.ego_description: Batman navigates around the corner structure, shifting perspective from the street below to the expansive city skyline ahead

entered.detail: Decorative Gothic archway forming the corner of the building
Structural iron beams supporting the rooftop extension
Expansive view of the Gotham City skyline with numerous illuminated buildings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around a decorative Gothic archway at the building's corner. As the camera pivots, the view shifts dramatically from the street below to reveal the expansive Gotham skyline. Metal support beams line the right side while distant spires emerge into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop promenade with panoramic Gotham skyline view

agents.ego_description: Batman continues along the elevated rooftop walkway with the illuminated Gotham skyline stretching into the distance

entered.detail: Tall Gothic tower with clock face and illuminated windows
Blue searchlights scanning the sky above distant buildings
Bridge structure spanning across the distant cityscape

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open rooftop edge, the scene presents an unobstructed panoramic view of Gotham City. A prominent Gothic clock tower stands to the left while searchlights sweep across the distant sky. The atmospheric haze and storm clouds create a dramatic backdrop for the illuminated cityscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked rooftop that transitions from a sheltered ledge into an expansive panoramic view of the Gotham skyline. It begins with Batman moving past a large illuminated billboard and Gothic architectural details, where the wet concrete reflects the ambient glow of a distant circular plaza. As the character turns left around a decorative Gothic archway, the perspective pivots away from the streets below to reveal a dramatic vista of distant spires and metal support beams. The scene then opens into an unobstructed view of the city, passing a prominent Gothic clock tower while searchlights sweep across a stormy, haze-filled sky.
